seo.title: Document Intelligence AI | Automated Document Processing for SMEs
seo.description: Automate invoices, delivery notes, receipts and many document types with AI. No-code guided setup, custom fields in natural language, ERP integration, Android app for field operators. From €49/mo.
seo.keywords: document intelligence, AI document automation, automated invoice data extraction, intelligent OCR software, document management AI, accounts payable automation, delivery note automation, ERP document integration, human-in-the-loop OCR, mobile document capture app, custom data extraction fields

hero.title: Documents to handle every day. Finch-AI reads them for you.
hero.lead: Guided setup, instant even for non-experts. Document Intelligence recognizes, extracts and verifies data from any type of document — and pushes it into your management system.

pipeline.p: Scan, manual upload or automatic intake via email.
The AI automatically extracts fields and tables from the document.
The operator reviews the data and confirms. No error reaches your system without approval.
Verified data flows into your management system via API or webhook.

brochure.title: Information brochure
brochure.text: The technical details and full use cases of Document Intelligence.

how.title: From document to ERP, automatically
how.lead: No operator involved until the review. Every step is automated, every exception handled.
how.imgAlt: Document Intelligence flow infographic — from document intake to ERP integration

docTypesHead.title: Supported document types
docTypesHead.lead: For each type, activation is guided: choose the fields, define the rules, configure the output. No code.

docTypes.title: Invoices
docTypes.desc: Supplier, VAT number, amount, tax, due date and line items. Electronic or scanned PDFs.

docTypes.title: Receipts
docTypes.desc: Employee reimbursements and expense reconciliation: date, amount, category, merchant.

docTypes.title: ID documents
docTypes.desc: ID card, passport, driver's license. Fast verification for banks and rentals.

docTypes.title: Delivery notes
docTypes.desc: Goods receiving, item codes, quantities and stock updates to the WMS.

docTypes.title: Bank statements
docTypes.desc: Bank movements with automatic classification and open-item matching.

docTypes.title: Purchase orders
docTypes.desc: Recording supplier orders and matching them against delivery notes.

docTypes.title: Credit notes
docTypes.desc: Invoice reversals and automatic linking to the original invoice.

docTypes.title: Health cards
docTypes.desc: Tax code, name and date of birth for fast check-in.

docTypes.title: Business cards
docTypes.desc: Name, company, role and contacts: every card becomes a contact in your CRM.

customModel.title: Proprietary documents? No problem.
customModel.text: For specific needs we build custom models for any company layout. No technical skills required on your side.

rulesHead.title: Custom fields, written the way you talk
rulesHead.lead: Define extraction rules exactly as you'd explain them to a colleague. The AI understands context and feeds your ERP with the exact fields you need.

ruleCards.title: Custom fields
ruleCards.desc: Create fields that don't exist in the document but that your ERP requires.
ruleCards.example: "Extract the cost-center code from the order reference. The format is CC-XXXX."

ruleCards.title: Derived fields
ruleCards.desc: Compute values from other already-extracted fields.
ruleCards.example: "Calculate the net taxable amount by subtracting the discount from the total."

ruleCards.title: Enrichment fields
ruleCards.desc: Add classifications and metadata based on your business rules.
ruleCards.example: "Classify the supplier as 'strategic' if the amount exceeds €5,000."

ruleDemo.label: Extraction rules — Supplier invoices
ruleDemo.ruleExample: "Extract the cost-center code from the order reference. The format is CC-XXXX."
ruleDemo.draftInput: Classify the supplier as 'strategic' if the amount exceeds €5,000

androidHead.title: In the warehouse, in the field, wherever you receive documents

android.title: The operator points at the delivery note. The system updates itself.
android.text: No need to go back to the office or use a PC. Open the app, point the camera at the document and in moments the data is extracted, verified and ready for the WMS.
android.feat4Desc: Data ready for the WMS in moments.

pricingHead.title: Subscription plans
pricingHead.lead: Billing based on processed pages. Scales with your business.
pricingHead.note1: Extra pages cost more than upgrading: for high volumes, an upgrade is the better deal.
pricingHead.note2: Limits are monthly and reset automatically.

faqs.q: Which document types does it support?
faqs.a: Domestic and international invoices, receipts, ID documents, delivery notes, bank statements, purchase orders, credit notes, health cards, payslips, business cards and contracts. For proprietary layouts we develop custom models.

faqs.q: Does it integrate with my ERP?
faqs.a: Yes, via REST API or webhook. You can configure the exact structure of the data to send — including custom and derived fields — for full compatibility with SAP, Zucchetti, TeamSystem, Sage and others.

faqs.q: Can I define fields that aren't in the document?
faqs.a: Yes: custom, derived and enrichment fields, written in natural language. For example "Classify the supplier as strategic if the amount exceeds €5,000".

faqs.q: Is there a mobile app for field work?
faqs.a: Yes, an Android app that captures documents from the phone's camera. Ideal for warehouse and logistics operators who record delivery notes in the field, without going back to the office.

Plans start with Basic at €49/mo + VAT (200 pages/month). A free Demo plan is available. The Business (€129/mo) and Professional (€249/mo) plans include higher volumes; for large volumes there's a custom Enterprise plan.
